Case Study

dataprof

High-performance data profiling with ISO 8000/25012 quality metrics.

Active OSS project Rust Python Apache Arrow CLI Data Quality
Back to workbench Ares + Ceres →

Why it exists

Profiling should be something teams can run in CI and scripts, not only in notebooks or ad hoc inspection sessions.

Technical center

The core combines bounded-memory profiling, column statistics, type and pattern detection, and ISO 8000/25012 quality dimensions across multiple input and export formats.

Current proof points

The repo already demonstrates selective metrics for faster runs, bounded-memory streaming, async and database feature flags, and distribution across Crates.io, docs.rs, and PyPI, so the multi-interface story is already visible in public artifacts rather than planned copy.

Repository Related article
Arrow path

Arrow export and zero-copy interchange.

System architecture

Rust core, interfaces, and report pipeline.
